prompt: Hyper-detailed technical cross-section diagram of a [type here object] rendered in a dark engineering blueprint style. The cutaway view reveals all internal components, layers, and mechanisms with precision. Every part is labeled with clean white annotation lines, callout boxes, and technical measurements. Include a title header at the top, a materials/components legend, dimensional specifications, and small detail insets showing close-up views of key sections. Style: professional technical illustration mixed with photorealistic rendering. Dense, information-rich layout. No empty space. 1:1 dimension.
